option.name: originalContent
option.value: org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx3G minecraft_version=1.19.2 minecraft_version_range=[1.19.2,1.20) forge_version=43.2.0 forge_version_range=[43.2.0,) loader_version_range=[43,) mod_id=examplemod mod_name=Example Mod mod_license=All rights reserved mod_version=1.0 mod_author=YourName mod_description=Example mod description pack_format_number=9 forge_version_range=[43,) minecraft_version_range=[1.19.2,1.20)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: org.gradle.jvmargs=-Xmx3G minecraft_version=1.20.1 minecraft_version_range=[1.20.1,1.20.2) neoforge_version=47.1.0 neoforge_version_range=[47.1.0,) loader_version_range=[47,) mod_id=examplemod mod_name=Example Mod mod_license=All rights reserved mod_version=1.0 mod_author=YourName mod_description=Example mod description pack_format_number=15

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<svg width="800" height="600" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"> <rect width="100%" height="100%" fill="#f0f0f0"/> <text x="400" y="30" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="24" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#333">Git Command Cheatsheet</text>
<!-- Section 1: Basic Commands --> <rect x="50" y="50" width="700" height="150" fill="#e0e0e0" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="2"/> <text x="400" y="70" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#333">Basic Commands</text> <text x="60" y="95" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" fill="#000">git init</text> <text x="60" y="115" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#666">Initialize a new Git repository</text> <text x="60" y="135" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" fill="#000">git status</text> <text x="60" y="155" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#666">Check the status of your working directory</text> <text x="60" y="175" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" fill="#000">git add .</text> <text x="60" y="195" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#666">Stage all changes for commit</text>
<!-- Section 2: Committing --> <rect x="50" y="220" width="700" height="100" fill="#e0e0e0" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="2"/> <text x="400" y="240" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#333">Committing</text> <text x="60" y="265" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" fill="#000">git commit -m "message"</text> <text x="60" y="285" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#666">Commit staged changes with a message</text> <text x="60" y="305" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" fill="#000">git log</text> <text x="60" y="325" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#666">View commit history</text>
<!-- Section 3: Branching --> <rect x="50" y="340" width="700" height="100" fill="#e0e0e0" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="2"/> <text x="400" y="360" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#333">Branching</text> <text x="60" y="385" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" fill="#000">git branch</text> <text x="60" y="405" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#666">List branches</text> <text x="60" y="425" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" fill="#000">git checkout -b branch-name</text> <text x="60" y="445" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#666">Create and switch to a new branch</text>
<!-- Section 4: Remote --> <rect x="50" y="460" width="700" height="100" fill="#e0e0e0" stroke="#ccc" stroke-width="2"/> <text x="400" y="480" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" text-anchor="middle" fill="#333">Remote Repositories</text> <text x="60" y="505" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" fill="#000">git remote add origin URL</text> <text x="60" y="525" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#666">Add a remote repository</text> <text x="60" y="545" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" fill="#000">git push origin main</text> <text x="60" y="565" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#666">Push changes to remote</text> <text x="60" y="585" font-family="monospace" font-size="14" fill="#000">git pull origin main</text> <text x="60" y="605" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#666">Pull changes from remote</text> </svg>
